name: autotranscribe2
description: AutoTranscribe2 CLI and core library for high-quality Dutch transcription on Apple Silicon.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/__tests__/TranscriptTitleFormatter.test.js dist/__tests__/TranscriptionService.test.js dist/__tests__/TranscriptionWorkflow.test.js dist/__tests__/JobLedgerRecovery.test.js dist/__tests__/MenuInput.test.js dist/__tests__/MenuWorkflow.test.js dist/__tests__/StatusDashboard.test.js dist/__tests__/JobWorkerHeartbeat.test.js dist/__tests__/WatcherControl.test.js dist/__tests__/Diagnostics.test.js dist/__tests__/FileSystemPoller.test.js dist/__tests__/OllamaTitleSuggester.test.js dist/__tests__/BackendFactory.test.js dist/__tests__/ConfigWriter.test.js
scripts.title:health: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js title-health
scripts.menu: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js menu
